specifications_table.Features: ‎Multi-Purpose Working Gloves tradesmen, builders, and working environments where extra protection is required. The latex coated gloves feature an enhanced ultra grip for added safety and are perfect for gardening as well as DIY use. The assembly gloves have an excellent fit, excellent flexibility, and excellent tactile sensitivity. This Working Gloves can be used for general purpose, highways, building and construction, logistics and warehousing, maintenance, retail.
